title: Better Terracotta
description: Recolors the terracotta blocks in a vanilla-friendly way to match the colors they're actually supposed to.
body:
Do you like the darker, duller colors of terracotta, but hate how some of them just don't even nearly match the color they're supposed to? Then this pack is for you. It makes the following changes: - Black, gray and light gray terracotta are now actually black/gray instead of brown. - White terracotta is no longer skin-colored. - Cyan terracotta is now actually cyan and no longer grayish. - Blue and light blue terracotta no longer has a purple-ish tint. - The shade of purple terracotta has been shifted a little towards blue, making it more distinct from pink and magenta terracotta - **All other colors remain unchanged.** **Note:** This pack may say that it was created for an older version, you can just ignore this.
Terms of Use You may:
- Use this pack freely on your singleplayer world or multiplayer server.
- Edit this pack freely for your private use.
- Include this pack as a world resource pack in a downloadable world.

You may not:
- Redistribute or sell this pack on other pages such as curseforge.
- Redistribute or sell edits of this pack.
- Claim this pack as yours.
